sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Scotiabank trims Verizon (VZ) price target as wireless promotions intensify
feed.summary: Scotiabank reduced its price target for Verizon (VZ) from $45 to $43, maintaining a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment was made due to an anticipated increase in promotional intensity within the wireless sector, indicating potential challenges for Verizon's market performance.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Insider Sold Shares Worth $2,009,189, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) recently sold shares valued at $2,009,189, as reported in a new SEC filing. This transaction comes amidst various other insider sales and company news, including Cadence launching a partner ecosystem and analyst price target adjustments. The company specializes in developing design software for integrated circuits and electronic systems.

feed.title: Miller, Costco SVP sells $1.37 million in COST stock
feed.summary: Russell D. Miller, Senior Executive Vice President at Costco Wholesale, sold 1,500 shares of Costco stock worth $1.37 million on January 9, 2026. Despite the insider selling, Costco's financial health is rated "GREAT" by InvestingPro, and the company has shown strong sales growth in recent reports, leading to positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: UBS Likes Pfizer's MTSR Obesity Deal but Stays Neutral on PFE
feed.summary: UBS initiated coverage on Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) with a Neutral rating and a $25 price target, citing uncertainty around future revenue due to upcoming patent expirations, despite liking the recent MTSR obesity deal. The firm suggests Pfizer needs more strategic moves to address long-term risks. Additionally, Pfizer announced a new AI-focused partnership with Boltz, PBC, to enhance drug discovery and development processes.

feed.title: Inside Jabil Inc.: The Quiet Giant Powering the World’s Electronics Supply Chain
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. is a behind-the-scenes powerhouse, building and running the hardware backbone for numerous consumer brands across diverse industries like electronics, automotive, healthcare, and cloud computing. The company excels in design, advanced manufacturing, global supply chain orchestration, and lifecycle services, offering deep vertical expertise and a resilient, regionalized manufacturing footprint. Jabil's competitive edge lies in its ability to manage complexity for OEMs, providing integrated platforms that help navigate volatile supply chains and accelerating product cycles.

feed.title: EOG Resources reports $21 million net cash payments for derivatives in Q4
feed.summary: EOG Resources reported net cash payments of $21 million for financial commodity derivatives in Q4 2025, according to its latest SEC filing. The company also provided details on average crude oil ($59.17/barrel WTI) and natural gas ($3.55/MMBtu Henry Hub) prices for the period and disclosed its use of mark-to-market accounting for derivatives and future Brent-linked gas sales. This update follows recent third-quarter earnings that surpassed EPS forecasts and a new board appointment.

feed.title: CBOE Stock Today: January 12 Affin Hwang to Offer VIX Futures
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets has partnered with Affin Hwang Investment Bank to introduce VIX futures to Malaysian investors, aiming to expand access and potentially increase trading volumes and fee revenue for Cboe. CBOE stock is currently trading near a 52-week high, exhibiting strong momentum but showing signs of being overbought. Investors are advised to monitor the company's next earnings call on February 6, 2026, for updates on international client adoption and the impact of this new distribution channel on growth and liquidity.

feed.title: Katherine Ramundo Sells 5,000 Shares of Aptiv PLC
feed.summary: Katherine Ramundo, Executive Vice President of Aptiv Services US LLC, sold 5,000 shares of Aptiv PLC (APTV) on January 8, 2026. This transaction reduces her total holdings to 116,959 shares. Over the past year, Aptiv PLC has seen one insider buy and thirteen insider sells, with the stock currently considered modestly undervalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Invesco (IVZ) Records Rise in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Invesco (IVZ) reported a 0.7% increase in its assets under management (AUM) to $2.17 trillion, driven by $7.7 billion in net long-term inflows. While the company demonstrates strong liquidity and profitability, its Altman Z-Score indicates potential financial instability, and valuation metrics suggest the stock is trading near historical highs. Investors should consider these mixed signals, along with insider selling and the stock's volatility.

feed.title: Honeywell International (HON): Citigroup Updates Analyst Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Honeywell International (HON) but lowered the target price from $267 to $262, a 1.87% decrease. This latest adjustment follows several other analysts who have also reduced their price targets for HON recently. Despite these adjustments, the average target price from 25 analysts is $233.69, suggesting a 12.03% upside from the current price, and the average brokerage recommendation remains "Outperform."

feed.title: Raymond James initiates Enphase Energy stock coverage with Market Perform rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage of Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Market Perform rating, acknowledging the company's strong market position and high-quality business despite premium pricing. The firm, however, expressed concerns about the solar sector's dependence on external factors like government subsidies and variable financing rates, noting that these factors have recently moved in an unfavorable direction. This report follows significant developments in the broader solar industry, including First Solar's expansion of manufacturing facilities.

feed.title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Receives Market Perform Rating from Raymon
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage on Enphase Energy (ENPH) with a "Market Perform" rating, acknowledging the company's strong market share and gross margins despite a post-COVID sales decline. Enphase faces sector-specific challenges including reliance on government subsidies, fluctuating financing rates, and a restrictive domestic policy environment. The company, a significant player in the solar market with a $4.8 billion market capitalization, exhibits mixed financial signals with strong liquidity but some stress indicated by its Altman Z-Score.

feed.title: Citigroup will pay 60 cents a share to investors on Feb. 27
feed.summary: Citigroup's Board of Directors has declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.60 per share, payable on February 27, 2026, to stockholders of record on February 2, 2026. The board also declared dividends for various series of Citigroup's preferred stock. These dividends ensure payments to holders of common and preferred shares are scheduled for late February and mid-February, respectively.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) Target Lowered at Cantor Fitzgerald as 2026 REIT Outlook Improves
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has lowered its price target for VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to $33 from $35, while maintaining an Overweight rating. Despite trailing the S&P 500 in 2025, the firm anticipates an improved outlook for US equity REITs in 2026 due to a supportive macroeconomic backdrop and increased M&A activity. VICI's stable supply and demand, strong balance sheet, and well-covered dividend, coupled with its triple-net lease model and long-term CPI-linked rent escalators, contribute to its appeal as a consistent dividend payer.

feed.title: Kroger offers discounts for food insecure
feed.summary: Kroger has launched its Verified Savings Program, offering a 20% discount on fresh fruits and vegetables to individuals receiving government assistance like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid. This initiative aims to combat food insecurity by making healthy food more accessible. Eligible customers can enroll online, and the discount will be automatically applied to purchases through January 31.

feed.title: This Midwest power company has paid dividends since 1946
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share, payable on February 17, 2026, to shareowners of record as of January 30, 2026. The company has a long history of paying dividends, having done so for 321 consecutive quarters since 1946, and is recognized as a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index. Alliant Energy provides regulated energy service to approximately 1 million electric and 430,000 natural gas customers across Iowa and Wisconsin.

feed.title: Hormel Foods announces retirement of two senior executives
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has announced the retirement of two long-serving executives: Mark Morey, vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, vice president of marketing for fresh and ready meats. Both executives have dedicated over 30 years to the company, holding various leadership roles. The company's interim CEO, Jeff Ettinger, expressed gratitude for their contributions, and their successors have not yet been announced.

feed.title: Lululemon Raises Q4 Outlook on Strong Holiday Demand
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica has increased its Q4 2025 revenue and EPS outlook, now expecting figures at the high end of previous guidance due to strong holiday season performance. The company's gross margin, operating expenses, and effective tax rate guidance remain unchanged, suggesting resilient demand despite challenges in the U.S. market. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates LULU as Outperform, noting its financial strength and strategic growth initiatives, but also highlights risks like increased costs and declining gross margins.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE:CRL) announced plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. for approximately $510 million and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million. These acquisitions are expected to strengthen its non-human primate supply chain and enhance biologics testing capabilities. The company also announced leadership changes and reported improving demand trends, with its shares trading near a 52-week high.

feed.title: Revvity expects to exceed Q4 guidance with 6% revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE:RVTY) anticipates exceeding its Q4 2025 revenue guidance, projecting approximately $772 million, marking 6% reported growth and 4% organic growth year-over-year. The company also expects full-year 2025 revenue of about $2.855 billion and adjusted earnings per share above its previous guidance of $4.90-$5.00. Revvity is scheduled to release its full financial results on February 2, 2026, and will host a conference call, with its CEO also presenting at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: Regions CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha named successor By Investing.com
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after 20 years with the bank. Anil Chadha, currently the Controller and head of Corporate Finance, will succeed him. Turner guided the company through significant growth, and Chadha brings extensive experience from previous roles at Ally Financial, Wachovia/Wells Fargo, and Capital One.

feed.title: Pool Corporation announces leadership changes as St. Romain to retire By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) announced the retirement of Senior Vice President Kenneth "Kenny" G. St. Romain in 2026 after over 40 years with the company. John B. Watwood has been appointed Executive Vice President to oversee North American swimming pool operations and lead digital and technology initiatives. The company continues to demonstrate strong financial performance, including 15 consecutive years of dividend increases, and analysts consider its stock undervalued.

feed.title: Option Care Health reports Q4 revenue of $1.46-1.47 billion By Investing.com
feed.summary: Option Care Health announced preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, projecting Q4 net revenue between $1.46 billion and $1.47 billion, and full year net revenue of $5.645 billion to $5.655 billion. The company also provided 2026 guidance, expecting net revenue between $5.8 billion and $6.0 billion, and expanded its share repurchase program authorization from $500 million to $1.0 billion. Analysts, despite varying price targets, generally view the company favorably, noting its strong market position and aggressive share buybacks.

feed.title: Invesco reports $2.17 trillion in assets under management for December By Investing.com
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $2,169.9 billion as of December 31, 2025, a 0.7% increase from the previous month. The company saw net long-term inflows of $7.7 billion and its stock price surged 82.36% over the past year, with a strong dividend yield. Recent strategic moves include the conversion of the Invesco QQQ fund to an open-end ETF and a partnership with LGT Capital Partners.

feed.title: NOV Stock: Why Holding for Now Is the Right Move, Not Buying
feed.summary: NOV Inc. (NOV) has seen its shares outperform the broader oil and energy market, driven by strategic positioning in long-term energy shifts, a record backlog, and strong free cash flow generation. However, challenges include a delayed convergence of growth cycles, a sharp bottom-line contraction, and continued difficulties in the offshore wind market. Given these mixed factors, investors are advised to hold rather than buy, awaiting a more favorable entry point.

feed.title: Rafael Holdings elects directors, approves equity plan amendment at annual meeting
feed.summary: Rafael Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RFL) held its annual meeting where shareholders elected directors, ratified CohnReznick LLP as their accounting firm, and approved an amendment to the company's 2021 Equity Incentive Plan. This amendment increases the shares of Class B common stock available for grant by 1,000,000. Additionally, the company recently issued warrants as part of its merger with Cyclo Therapeutics, which are now listed on NYSE American.

feed.title: PTL Ltd announces $3.88 million registered direct offering of ordinary shares
feed.summary: PTL Ltd has announced a registered direct offering of 155 million Class A ordinary shares at $0.025 per share, aiming to raise approximately $3.88 million. The proceeds will be used for vessel acquisition, working capital, and general corporate purposes. This offering is made to unaffiliated investors under an effective registration statement and has been approved by the company's board of directors.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corp Updates Financial Statement Presentation
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp (TFC) announced updates to its financial statement presentation, effective December 31, 2025, to better align with its business management. These changes involve reclassifications of treasury management and lease-related items, applied retrospectively for illustrative purposes without revising or restating previously reported financial results. Unaudited supplemental financial information was provided for historical periods to reflect these changes.

feed.title: ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Investors that a Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm Before January 26th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE:ARE) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Alexandria made false and misleading statements regarding its Long Island City property and its Megacampus™ strategy. Investors have until January 26, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: NetApp Adds Independent Director to Strengthen AI Strategy
feed.summary: NetApp expanded its board to ten members by appointing Paul Fipps, President of Global Customer Operations at ServiceNow, as an independent director. This strategic addition aims to strengthen NetApp's execution and innovation in its AI-ready data infrastructure strategy, leveraging Fipps's extensive experience in AI and digital transformation. Analysts currently rate NetApp as a Buy with a $130 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also provides an "Outperform" rating, citing strong financial performance and a strategic focus on high-margin segments.

feed.title: Hormel announces upcoming retirements of Morey and Peil
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has announced the upcoming retirements of two long-serving leaders: Mark Morey, vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, vice president of marketing for fresh and ready meats. Morey served for over three decades in various roles including sales, marketing, and operations, while Peil contributed 36 years in sales and marketing leadership. Both executives played crucial roles in the growth and transformation of their respective divisions within Hormel.

feed.title: U.S. trial begins over deaths of three Ontario passengers in 2019 Boeing crash
feed.summary: A trial has begun in Chicago regarding the deaths of three Ontario residents who perished in the 2019 Ethiopian Airlines Boeing 737 Max crash. Manant Vaidya is seeking damages from Boeing Co. and Rosemount Aerospace Inc. on behalf of his family members. Boeing has expressed sorrow and accepted legal responsibility for the accidents, having settled most claims while acknowledging families' rights to pursue damages through trials.

feed.title: Boston Scientific plans 300,000-square-foot expansion at Maple Grove campus
feed.summary: Boston Scientific is planning a significant 300,000-square-foot expansion of its recently completed Maple Grove campus. This expansion will include additional office and lab space, along with various amenities such as walking paths, ponds, and gardens. The move follows Boston Scientific's major real estate deal in 2025, when its new facility was the biggest commercial real estate transaction of the year.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. announced its plans to acquire K.F. Cambodia for approximately $510 million to bolster its non-human primate supply chain and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million to enhance biologics testing capabilities. The company also appointed Dr. Namandjé Bumpus as Senior Vice President, Chief Scientific and Innovation Officer, and reported improving demand trends, with shares trading near their 52-week high. These acquisitions and positive outlook are expected to be accretive to non-GAAP earnings per share in 2026 and 2027.

feed.title: Crown Castle terminates DISH Wireless deal after payment default By Investing.com
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. has terminated its wireless infrastructure agreement with DISH Wireless due to DISH defaulting on payment obligations, seeking over $3.5 billion in owed payments. DISH had previously notified partners it was discontinuing its network business after its parent company, EchoStar, planned to sell spectrum licenses. Crown Castle reiterated its commitment to enforcing contractual rights, despite DISH's claims regarding FCC actions, and expects no impact on its 2025 financial results.

feed.title: Revvity expects to exceed Q4 guidance with 6% revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. announced preliminary financial results for Q4 2025, expecting approximately $772 million in revenue, a 6% reported growth year-over-year. The company also projects full-year 2025 revenue to be around $2.855 billion, with adjusted earnings per share anticipated to surpass previous guidance. Revvity plans to release its complete results on February 2, 2026, and will host a conference call, with its CEO Prahlad Singh also presenting at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: Regions CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha named successor By Investing.com
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. (NYSE:RF) announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after 20 years with the bank. Anil Chadha, currently the company’s Controller and head of Corporate Finance, will succeed Turner. Under Turner's leadership, Regions' stock price grew approximately 320 percent, and the company is on track to lead its peer group in return on average tangible common equity for the fifth consecutive year.

feed.title: ServiceNow executive Paul Fipps joins NetApp’s board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: NetApp has appointed Paul Fipps, President of Global Customer Operations at ServiceNow, to its Board of Directors, expanding the board to ten members. Fipps brings over 20 years of experience in technology-enabled growth and customer transformation, which NetApp believes will be instrumental in helping customers build intelligent data infrastructure. The appointment comes as NetApp, valued at $21.24 billion and maintaining a "GOOD" financial health rating, continues to strengthen its leadership amid a focus on AI-ready data infrastructure solutions.

feed.title: Invesco reports $2.17 trillion in assets under management for December By Investing.com
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $2,169.9 billion as of December 31, 2025, marking a 0.7% increase from the previous month and a significant 82.36% stock price surge over the past year. The company saw net long-term inflows of $7.7 billion in December and has maintained dividend payments for 19 consecutive years, signaling strong investor confidence and strategic growth. Recent developments include a QQQ fund restructuring, a new partnership with LGT Capital Partners, and a raised price target from BMO Capital, all contributing to Invesco's efforts to modernize offerings and strengthen its market position.

feed.title: OneSpan (OSPN) to Acquire Build38, Enhancing Mobile Security Offerings
feed.summary: OneSpan (OSPN) announced its plan to acquire Build38, a mobile app protection solutions provider, to enhance its mobile security offerings and App Shielding services with advanced SDK-based security, integrating in-app, cloud, and AI technologies. The acquisition, expected to finalize by March 2026, aims to protect businesses from increasing mobile-based attacks. OneSpan displays strong financial health with robust profitability, low leverage, and attractive valuation metrics, suggesting a stable and potentially undervalued investment opportunity.

feed.title: Citigroup Has Lowered Expectations for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Stock Price
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) from $267 to $262, while maintaining a "Buy" rating, suggesting a 25.6% upside from the current share price. Several other analysts have also revised their targets downwards, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold" with an average price target of $233.90, compared to the stock's current trading price around $208.60. Honeywell recently reported quarterly EPS of $2.25 and provided FY2025 guidance of $10.60–$10.70 EPS, with institutional ownership remaining high at approximately 75.9%.

feed.title: Barclays Downgrades DexCom (DXCM), Lowers Price Target to $71.00
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded DexCom (DXCM) from Equal-Weight to Underweight, reducing its price target from $80.00 to $71.00. This indicates a bearish outlook from Barclays despite other analysts maintaining or raising price targets for DXCM in recent months. DexCom, which designs continuous glucose monitoring systems, has an average analyst target price of $86.80, suggesting a potential upside of 22.29%.

feed.title: Pete Hegseth gives fiery ‘warrior’ speech to Lockheed Martin workers in Fort Worth
feed.summary: U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth delivered a fiery speech at Lockheed Martin's F-35 plant in Fort Worth, emphasizing increased defense spending and a return to "warrior ethos." He announced a significant budget increase for 2027 and stressed that defense contracts would be awarded based on quick delivery of superior products. Hegseth also declared an end to "woke ideology" distractions, focusing instead on developing a lethal and disciplined military.

feed.title: SkimTurf Management to connect with the John Deere Operations Center
feed.summary: SkimTurf Management has integrated with the John Deere Operations Center, enabling golf course superintendents to use SkimTurf data for precise spraying with John Deere equipment. This connection helps optimize resource allocation, enhance turf maintenance efficiency, and promote sustainability by minimizing unnecessary applications. The new "Prescriptions" module in the SkimTurf app allows users to define targeted spray zones based on specific measurement ranges.

feed.title: Scorpius Holdings, Inc. SEC 10-Q Report
feed.summary: Scorpius Holdings, Inc. has released its Q2 2025 Form 10-Q report, detailing significant financial and operational challenges. The company has ceased its contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) services, sold key assets, and is now classified as a 'Shell Company.' With substantial losses and no anticipated near-term revenue, its future depends on a strategic transaction like a reverse merger or asset acquisition.

feed.title: Western Digital to Announce Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on January 29, 2026
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) is scheduled to announce its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call with the investment community on the same day at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern to discuss the results. A live audio webcast and replay will be accessible via investor.wdc.com.

feed.title: Option Care Health Inc - Q4 2025 Net Revenue Expected At $1.46 Billion-$1.47 Billion - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Option Care Health Inc. (OPCH) has announced its expected net revenue for Q4 2025 to be between $1.46 billion and $1.47 billion, according to an SEC filing. This information was released via Reuters news and is based on the company's latest financial disclosures. The article primarily highlights this revenue projection without further detailed text.

feed.title: Western Digital sets date to share latest quarterly financials
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) announced it will release its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on Thursday, January 29, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern on the same day to discuss these results. A live audio webcast and replay will be available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: LAKELAND ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is Investigating Lakeland Industries, Inc. on Behalf of Lakeland Stockholders and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against Lakeland Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAKE) on behalf of its stockholders. This investigation follows a significant drop in Lakeland's stock price after the company reported a 95% decrease in adjusted EBITDA and a net loss of $16 million for Q3 2026, largely attributed to certification delays. The firm encourages affected investors to contact them to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: Regions Financial CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha to succeed
feed.summary: Regions Financial announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31 after nearly 40 years in finance, including two decades at the bank. He will be succeeded by Regions Bank veteran Anil Chadha, who currently serves as Controller and head of Corporate Finance and is part of Turner’s leadership team. Chadha has been responsible for financial reporting, accounting policy, and all financial planning activities.
